title: XVelvety Grass Algerian Dum
description: A grassy, velvety brunch-mood Algerian dish featuring red wine jelly and dum. Vegan-friendly.

ingredients.name: ground flaxseed or almond meal for dumming liquid

instructions: In a small bowl, mix red wine jelly with vegetable broth or water and fresh lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper.
Add the cooked quinoa to the wine mixture and stir well until combined.
Blend herbs into the quinoa/wine mixture until smooth. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
In a Dutch oven, heat olive oil over medium heat. Pour in the quinoa/herb mixture, add ground flaxseed or almond meal for dumming liquid, and mix well.
Bring to a simmer and cook for about 20-30 minutes until thickened and slightly golden on top. Serve hot as a brunch dish.
